scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:vercel: pnpm --filter @workspace/db exec tsc --build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod exec tsc --build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-client-react exec tsc --build && pnpm --filter centre-tour run build && cp -r artifacts/centre-tour/dist .
